action_title: Proudly made in Ukraine CBD jellies
action_description: If you're looking for a calming solution to everyday stress or to deal with the effects of PTSD, we have just what you need. We present to you our CBD jellies, pride and the best product from Ukraine! What makes them special? In addition to their unsurpassed taste and soothing properties, they are offered at a price that is significantly lower than the cost of products from foreign competitors. Get rid of anxiety and stress, feeling lightness and harmony with our CBD jelly.
all_products_title: CBD Gummies made in Ukraine for ukrainians
all_products_description: Our products are made from high-quality ingredients of Western origin. This gives it the opportunity to compete and be at the level of products from the USA and Europe, while having a fair lower price than Western analogues and a higher dose of the active ingredient cannabidiol.
subscribe_title: Useful information about CBD in Ukraine and the world
subscribe_description: By subscribing to the newsletter, you will receive useful information, short- and longreads that will allow you to learn more about the use of CBD in the world, its growing popularity and benefits.
footer_description: Balance Botanica is one of the first companies in Ukraine that produces products containing cannabidiol (CBD) in its composition. Founded in 2023. The production of products containing CBD meets the growing demand in society. Production in Ukraine allows us to offer people high-quality products that can compete with Western counterparts at a much lower price.
